posting.locationSummary: Central, Finger Lakes, North Country, and Southern regions of New York State
posting.applicationSummary: Obtain an application at JATC for Ironworkers Local Union #60 in Syracuse or online at ironworkers60.org during the recruitment period, then submit the completed application with two letters of recommendation by April 23, 2027.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: JATC for Ironworkers Local Union #60, 500 West Genesee Street, Syracuse, NY 13204
posting.applicationHours: 9:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m., Monday through Friday, excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must be a resident of Ironworkers Local Union #60 jurisdiction for at least six months prior to recruitment. The jurisdiction includes Broome, Cayuga, Chenango, Cortland, Jefferson, Madison, Onondaga, Oswego, Seneca, Schuyler, Tioga, Tompkins, and Wayne counties.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from work and required classes at the approved school. Must possess a valid New York State driver’s license to operate company vehicles.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must take and pass a drug test, at the sponsor’s expense, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.classRequirement: Must attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old. Proof will be required after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must take a basic math and detail accuracy assessment test during the interview process.
Must be in good physical condition and pass an agility test, which includes climbing ladders and working at heights.
Must take and pass a drug test, at the expense of the sponsor after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must provide military transfer card or discharge form DD-214, if applicable, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must provide a copy of birth certificate at the time of appointment.
Must have reliable transportation to and from work and required classes at the approved school.
Must possess a valid NYS driver’s license in order to operate company vehicles. Proof will be required after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.

Must be a resident of Ironworkers Local Union #60 jurisdiction for at least six months prior to recruitment. The jurisdiction includes the counties of Broome, Cayuga, Chenango, Cortland, Jefferson, Madison, Onondaga, Oswego, Seneca, Schuyler, Tioga, Tompkins, and Wayne.
The application must be completed in its entirety and submitted with two letters of recommendation from previous employers.
Recent graduates may submit letters of recommendation from teachers, school officials etc.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, pass a math/detail assessment and agility test, complete a full application with two letters of recommendation, pass a drug test, have reliable transportation and a valid NYS driver’s license, and meet the six-month local residency requirement.
posting.contactSummary: Contact JATC for Ironworkers Local Union #60 at (315) 422-8200 for further information.
